title: aloysia lycioides var. schulziae
intro: Aloysia lycioides var. schulziae, also known as Chilean tea tree or Schulzia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. This shrub is native to South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aloysia lycioides var. schulziae include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Aloysia lycioides var. schulziae can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used to make herbal remedies for various health concerns.
